query:
-- Get the axiom-platform company ID first
SET @companyId = (SELECT id FROM tenant_companies WHERE slug = 'axiom-platform');

-- Create the axiom_owner user
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, username, passwordHash, loginMethod, role, systemRole, tenantCompanyId, isActive, lastSignedIn)
VALUES (
  CONCAT('cred_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()), '_apexowner'),
  'AXIOM Platform Owner',
  'owner@apexcrm.com',
  'apexowner',
  '$2b$12$Iv3NAiP/9u34HJXOnNVO5OoYQ/1uLDJQjhudf6FYV4qH89HtDpkxS',
  'credentials',
  'admin',
  'axiom_owner',
  @companyId,
  1,
  NOW()
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute 
-- Get the axiom-platform company ID first
SET @companyId = (SELECT id FROM tenant_companies WHERE slug = 'axiom-platform');

-- Create the axiom_owner user

VALUES (
  CONCAT('cred_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()), '_apexowner'),
  'AXIOM Platform Owner',
  'owner@apexcrm.com',
  'apexowner',
  '$2b$12$Iv3NAiP/9u34HJXOnNVO5OoYQ/1uLDJQjhudf6FYV4qH89HtDpkxS',
  'credentials',
  'admin',
  'axiom_owner',
  @companyId,
